# Contributing

Thanks for helping improve Echo Isle.

This repository is used for the public website, legal documents, support pages, and user feedback workflows. The iOS source code is maintained separately.

## Good Contributions

- Clear bug reports with reproducible steps.
- Public RSS feeds that demonstrate feed parsing or playback issues.
- Thoughtful feature requests grounded in a real listening workflow.
- Documentation fixes for the website, privacy policy, support page, or terms.
- Publisher content-rights requests with enough detail to verify the feed and requested action.

## Before Opening An Issue

- Search existing issues.
- Remove private or sensitive information.
- Include app version, iOS version, and device model when relevant.
- Include only public RSS feed URLs.

## Privacy

Do not post private RSS feed URLs, authentication tokens, passwords, payment information, or personal data in public issues or discussions.

## Pull Requests

Pull requests are welcome for website and documentation changes.

For policy pages, keep language clear and product-accurate. If a change affects legal meaning, explain why the change is needed in the pull request description.
